properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V3 C2 V4 C2 V5 C2

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Align me with my theophany Align me with my theophany Align me with my theophany I'm rapturing away from faith unto faith Build the pyramid in my earth From a terrestrial to the celestial I'm going home, I'm going home From a terrestrial to the celestial I'm going home, I'm going home

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: I want to fly with eagle's wings in perfection I want to soar where eagles dare in perfect love And I unite with the Spoken Word I've caught in my heart And I grow from virtue unto virtue I'm being perfected

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Amnesia is leaving me By the preaching of the Word Divine picture of me, Lord, I've come to know From a terrestrial to the celestial I'm going home, I'm going home From a terrestrial to the celestial I'm going home, I'm going home

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: My theophany beholds the Father's face Through my earthly journey To my eternal destination From a terrestrial to the celestial I'm going home, I'm going home From a terrestrial to the celestial I'm going home, I'm going home

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: Take ye the wings and fly, Let's fly with eagle's wings Take ye the wings and fly Into the supernatural things Above the clapping of the hands Above the joy of the saints Take ye the wings and soar above The rabble of these things
